LanguageData.RimTalk_ManyRatkinBabies.label: 好多鼠鼠
LanguageData.RimTalk_ManyRatkinBabies.stages.0.label: 好多鼠鼠
LanguageData.RimTalk_ManyRatkinBabies.stages.0.descri: 咿呀？周圍有鼠寶寶在叫...
LanguageData.RimTalk_LiveInRatkinNursery.label: 住在鼠鼠窩
LanguageData.RimTalk_LiveInRatkinNursery.stages.0.des: 我和好多鼠寶寶玩得超級開心！
LanguageData.RimTalk_ManyKiiroBabies.label: 好多貓貓
LanguageData.RimTalk_ManyKiiroBabies.stages.0.label: 好多貓貓
LanguageData.RimTalk_LiveInKiiroNursery.label: 住在貓貓窩
LanguageData.RimTalk_LiveInKiiroNursery.stages.0.desc: 摸了貓寶寶的尾巴，好玩喵！
LanguageData.RimTalk_ManyMoeLotlBabies.label: 黏糊糊
LanguageData.RimTalk_ManyMoeLotlBabies.stages.0.label: 黏糊糊
LanguageData.RimTalk_ManyMoeLotlBabies.stages.0.descr: 我和其他萌螈寶寶窩在一起。
LanguageData.RimTalk_LiveInMoeLotlNursery.label: 濕潤的寶寶房
LanguageData.RimTalk_ManyMiliraBabies.label: 羽毛香氣
LanguageData.RimTalk_ManyMiliraBabies.stages.0.label: 羽毛香氣
LanguageData.RimTalk_LiveInMiliraNursery.label: 天使托兒所
LanguageData.RimTalk_LiveInMiliraNursery.stages.0.des: 這里有好多米莉拉寶寶！像天空城里一樣！
LanguageData.RimTalk_ManyBunnyBabies.label: 好多兔子
LanguageData.RimTalk_ManyBunnyBabies.stages.0.label: 好多兔子
LanguageData.RimTalk_LiveInBunnyNursery.label: 住在兔子洞
LanguageData.RimTalk_LiveInBunnyNursery.stages.0.desc: 我和其他寶寶住在一起！
LanguageData.RimTalk_ManyCinderBabies.label: 擠在一起
LanguageData.RimTalk_ManyCinderBabies.stages.0.label: 擠在一起
LanguageData.RimTalk_LiveInCinderNursery.label: 余燼堆
LanguageData.RimTalk_LiveInCinderNursery.stages.0.des: 好暖和...寶寶們擠成一團啦。
